# MCP Weather Server Location Formats Test
# Tests various location input formats

# Build the weather server binary
go build -o mcp-weather-server .

# Set API key for tests
env OPENWEATHER_API_KEY=test_api_key_123

# Test simple city name
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"London"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test city with country code
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Paris,FR"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test city with full country name (should work if API supports it)
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Berlin,Germany"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test city with state/province
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Austin,TX,US"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test city with spaces
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"New York"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test city with special characters
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"São Paulo"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test city with accented characters
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Zürich"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test city with hyphens
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Baden-Baden"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test city with apostrophes
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"L'Aquila"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test Asian city names
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Tokyo,JP"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test Arabic/Middle Eastern city names
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Dubai,AE"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test Cyrillic city names
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Moscow,RU"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test very long city name
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Llanfairpwllgwyngyllgogerychwyrndrobwllllantysiliogogogoch"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test forecast with various location formats
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{"location":"Barcelona,ES"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting weather forecast'

# Test with mixed current weather and forecast for same location
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Amsterdam,NL"}},"id":2}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{"location":"Amsterdam,NL"}},"id":3}
EOF

# Both should fail with test API key
stdout '"isError":true'
